faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in East Meadow?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in East Meadow typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in East Meadow homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours to complete, depending on your property size. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require multiple visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart for optimal results and to target newly hatched eggs.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my East Meadow home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to 135°F+ to kill bed bugs. For chemical treatments, you typically need to leave for 4-6 hours. We'll provide specific instructions based on your treatment plan and ensure your home is safe before re-entry.

faqs.question: Are your bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in East Meadow?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. All treatments are family and pet-friendly once the application has dried or the heat treatment is complete. We follow strict safety protocols and provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry to your home.
